tool.name: aoptk normalize chemicals

configfiles.configfile:
from aoptk.normalization.pubchem_api import PubChemAPI from aoptk.chemical import Chemical import os import pandas as pd
chemicals_df = pd.read_csv("$input_file", sep="\t") chemicals_df["chemical"] = chemicals_df["chemical"].apply( lambda x: PubChemAPI().normalize_chemical(Chemical(x)) ) chemicals_df["heading"] = chemicals_df["chemical"].apply(lambda chem: chem.heading) chemicals_df.to_csv("normalized_chemicals.tsv", sep="\t", index=False)

param.name: input_file
param.label: TSV with chemical column.
param.help: Input tsv file with chemical column.

tool.help:
Chemical Normalization ===================
Tool to normalize chemical entities.
